ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "current_team_id" TEXT /* Current team ID of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "coach_id" TEXT /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "firing_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* List of previous teams the coach has coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Player ID of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Team ID of the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts */,
  "field_goal_avg_yards" REAL /* Average yards per field goal */,
  "field_goal_blocked" INTEGER /* Number of field goals blocked */,
  "field_goal_longest" INTEGER /* Longest field goal made */,
  "field_goal_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goal_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards of field goals made */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "touchback_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of touchbacks on kickoffs */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Average weather conditions during field goal attempts */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Number of field goals made at home vs. away */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player season being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player season */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player season was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League ID of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that won the championship in the season */,
  "most_valuable_player_id" TEXT /* ID of the most valuable player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_most_valuable_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_valuable_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "commissioner_id" TEXT /* ID of the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_commissioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("commissioner_id") REFERENCES commissions ("commission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each commission */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the commissioner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the commissioner */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the commissioner was hired */,
  "firing_date" TEXT /* Date the commissioner was fired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id")
)
